name: Balanced Paranthesis
category: Stack and Queues [Learning, Pre-In-Post-fix, Monotonic Stack, Implementation]
statement: Given string str containing just the characters '(', ')', '{', '}', '[' and ']', check if the input string is valid and return true if the string is balanced otherwise return false.

examples.explanation: As every open bracket has its corresponding close bracket. Match parentheses are in correct order hence they are balanced.
As ‘[‘ does not have ‘]’ hence it is not valid and will return false.
